_comment: REFERENCE MAPPING — a GRC control register (ServiceNow / Archer / OpenPages) → the operational-readiness control (OPS-READINESS). The bank's GRC system is the system of record for many controls; this adapter reconciles the Loom's readiness declarations against it, so the two do not drift.
capability: The enterprise control register's live status for the service's operational-resilience controls

activation_evidence._comment: ADOPT: fill from a real GRC export reconciled against docs/governance/services/<id>.json.
activation_evidence.fetched_at: ADOPT: timestamp of your GRC export
activation_evidence.reconciled: ADOPT: 'true' once the register status matches the readiness manifest
